news.summary:

news.headline: Why Trump’s Hormuz rebuke won’t derail South Korea’s ‘very strong’ alliance with US
news.summary:
US President Donald Trump’s public rebuke of South Korea for refusing to send warships to the Strait of Hormuz is an uncomfortable moment for a 70-year alliance, piling fresh pressure on a Seoul government already uneasy about Washington’s appetite for confrontation in the Middle East.

news.summary:

news.headline: Hip-hop pioneer, Afrika Bambaataa,  dies aged 68
news.summary: The Bronx born rapper's global hit Planet Rock is credited with shaping hip-hop in the 1980s.

news.headline: India proposes new rules to regulate news and political posts on social media
news.summary: The changes will give government more power over news-related posts shared by podcasters and influencers.

news.headline: Iran’s Battered Leaders Emerge From War Confident — and With New Cards
news.summary: For Iran’s theocratic rulers, just surviving the U.S.-Israeli onslaught means victory. But the seeds of their next crisis may already be planted.

news.summary: Israeli strikes against Hezbollah in Lebanon threatened the cease-fire between the United States and Iran ahead of scheduled peace talks.

news.headline: In Germany’s East, the Far Right Could Soon Take Power. This Is Its Plan.
news.summary: In the eastern state of Saxony-Anhalt, the Alternative for Germany could win control of the government this fall. Once in power, it has a plan to overhaul German society.

news.headline: Video shows explosion over Erbil in suspected drone interception
news.summary: Video shows an explosion in the sky above Erbil, in the Kurdish region of northern Iraq.
